title: The Signal the Sample Couldn't Catch
excerpt: A 5% sample returned clean. Full population testing found AED 7.7M. The assurance statement didn't fail — it transferred the detection risk invisibly to the organisation while appearing to address it.

title: The Assumption Every AI Governance Framework Makes
excerpt: NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001, and the UAE AI Policy Framework all assume formal authority is real authority. In GCC institutions, the person accountable on the org chart is rarely the person who made the decision. That gap is where AI risk lives.

title: NMC Health: The Architecture of Invisible Debt
excerpt: A $6.6bn fraud built on 80+ direct bank relationships that bypassed treasury, management-facilitated confirmation letters, and a board with no structural position from which to notice. The auditor incompetence narrative misses the mechanism entirely.
